pr.title: Record: SLOT + Split-LR + Full GPTQ + XSA-all — val_bpb 1.1015 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Combines SLOT eval-time delta tuning, split Muon LR, sigmoid-gated skips, soft-round QAT, and BigramHash growth atop the GPTQ stack.
techniques: SLOT per-batch logit delta optimization via AdamW at eval
Split early/late Muon LR with longer warmdown to sustain learning signal
Sigmoid-gated skips plus soft-round QAT with larger BigramHash and Brotli compression
